ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISBLANK(Expected_payment_date__c), OR( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Course__c, "CPA"), ISPICKVAL(Course__c, "CMA"), ISPICKVAL(Course__c, "CAIRA") ), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "M6") ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Course__c, "US Pathway"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "U6") ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Expected Payment Date is mandatory at this Stage.
